notes: B2B contract-readiness. Bright, clean, professional, aspirational. Australian schools/childcare settings, done safely and out-of-hours (no children present near wet/treated floors). No on-image text, no real brand names/logos.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Commercial Floor Care for Schools & Childcare Contracts'
images.prompt: A bright, modern Australian primary school corridor after hours, empty of children, where a professional cleaner in plain branded workwear operates a walk-behind floor scrubber on gleaming polished vinyl flooring. A yellow wet-floor caution sign stands nearby. Clean, aspirational, professional, warm daylight through the windows. Realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no children present, no clutter, no mess, no on-image text, no logos or brand names, no watermarks

images.context: Module on vinyl strip and seal — the high-risk job
images.prompt: A professional performing a vinyl strip-and-seal job in a bright Australian childcare hall, the work area cordoned off with wet-floor safety signs, applying floor sealer in thin even coats with proper gloves and knee pads. Orderly, safe, methodical, freshly glossy floor. Realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no children present, no on-image text, no logos or brand names, no watermarks

images.context: Module on tile and grout cleaning
images.prompt: A close-up of gleaming, freshly cleaned tile and grout in a bright, spotless Australian childcare bathroom, with a professional's gloved hand and a colour-coded cleaning brush visible. Clean, hygienic, high-quality result. Realistic photography.
images.negativePrompt: no children present, no grime remaining, no on-image text, no logos, no watermarks
